headline: PAG Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Service and Parts
summary: PAG beats Q1 EPS estimates as record service & parts revenues offset softer sales, weather hits and weaker new-vehicle volumes

headline: Lithia Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Higher Aftersales Margin
summary: LAD Q1 tops EPS estimates as aftersales margins expand, offsetting weaker new-vehicle demand and rising costs amid shifting revenue mix.
